description: Reusable audit program templates seeded into adp_auditprogram. A program is a named bundle of procedures with a default materiality % and target framework.

programs.name: Statutory Audit (Financial Year End)
programs.description: Full-scope statutory audit covering revenue, purchases, payroll, fixed assets, tax & disclosures.

programs.name: GST Annual Audit (GSTR-9C Reconciliation)
programs.description: Reconcile audited books with GSTR-9 outward & inward supplies, ITC ledger and rate-wise GSTR-3B.

programs.name: Internal Controls Review
programs.description: Continuous-controls assessment covering segregation of duties, journal entry hygiene, bank reconciliations and approval workflows.

programs.name: Income-Tax Audit (Section 44AB)
programs.description: Form 3CA/3CB + 3CD reporting: turnover validation, payments to specified persons, depreciation, disallowances under 40A(3)/43B.
